title: mammea malayana
intro: Mammea malayana, also known as the velvet apple tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The extracts of Mammea malayana have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Mammea malayana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
